{"rule":"EN_UNPAIRED_QUOTES","sentence":"^\\QLearn why treating AI like an overly enthusiastic newcomer who needs proper supervision is key to unlocking its potential.\\n\\nKey insights:\\n✅ AI enhances stakeholder communication & automates reporting\\n✅ Requires careful balance between efficiency gains & junior staff development\\n✅ Needs strategic implementation as a formal organisational project\\n✅ Functions best with domain expertise & human oversight\\n\\nDon't let AI disrupt your talent pipeline—discover how to preserve learning opportunities while building next-generation skills for sustainable success.\"\\E$"}
{"rule":"MORFOLOGIK_RULE_EN_GB","sentence":"^\\QThen \"Becomes the plow that breaks the fallow ground,\".\\E$"}

{"rule":"POSSESSIVE_APOSTROPHE","sentence":"^\\QThe first quatrain introduces the paradox, the second uses metaphor (sword to plow), the third questions the outcomes, leading to the couplet's conclusion.\\E$"}
{"rule":"MORFOLOGIK_RULE_EN_GB","sentence":"^\\QThe first quatrain introduces the paradox, the second uses metaphor (sword to plow), the third questions the outcomes, leading to the couplet's conclusion.\\E$"}
{"rule":"MORFOLOGIK_RULE_EN_GB","sentence":"^\\Q\"The sword, once forged to sunder bonds of trust, Becomes the plow that breaks the fallow ground...\"\\E$"}
{"rule":"MORFOLOGIK_RULE_EN_GB","sentence":"^\\QTheme: Explores transformation—war's tools repurposed for growth, symbolizing hope amid ruin (e.g., swords turned to plows).\\E$"}
